title: Bambolim Beach
tagline: Bambolim Beach — beach town of Goa

overview.short: Bambolim is a census town located in the southeastern part of the city of Panaji, the capital of the Indian state of Goa.
overview.description: Bambolim is a census town located in the southeastern part of the city of Panaji, the capital of the Indian state of Goa. It is completely located on the island of Tiswadi, one of the talukas in the state of Goa. The only allopathic medical college in the state of Goa, Goa Medical College, is located here.

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Grand Hyatt Goa
topPlaces.description: Grand Hyatt Goa is a five-star deluxe hotel located by Bambolim Bay in Goa, India. Designed in 1990, the construction of the hotel was started initially in 1995 by the Dynamix Group and thereafter on the formation of DB Group.

topPlaces.name: Siridao
topPlaces.description: Siridao, or Siridão, is a village located at the southern end of the city of Panaji, capital of the Indian state of Goa. It is completely located on the island of Tiswadi, one of the talukas in the state of Goa.

topPlaces.name: Dr. Shyama Prasad Mukherjee Indoor Stadium
topPlaces.description: Dr Shyama Prasad Mukherjee Indoor Stadium is an indoor stadium located on the campus of Goa University at Taleigao, Goa, India. The stadium was constructed for the 2014 Lusophony Games for events of volleyball and basketball.

image.alt: Dr. Shyama Prasad Mukherjee Indoor Stadium

topPlaces.name: GMC Athletic Stadium
topPlaces.description: The GMC Athletic Stadium in Bambolim is the first integrated athletic complex in Goa. It has been constructed according to the IAAF specifications and norms and has hosted the athletic events of 2014 Lusofonia Games.

topPlaces.name: St. Cruz, Goa
topPlaces.description: Santa Cruz (formerly Calapor) is a village located next to the city of Panaji, capital of the Indian state of Goa. It is located on the island of Tiswadi, one of the talukas in the state of Goa.

topPlaces.name: Kendriya Vidyalaya Bambolim
topPlaces.description: K V Bambolim is a Kendriya Vidyalaya in the 3TTR, 5TTR and 2STC army camp, in Bambolim, Goa, India. Nested in the mountains of Bambolim, it has a panoramic view of the city of Panaji.

topPlaces.name: International Centre, Goa
topPlaces.description: International Centre, Goa is a prominent conference centre, seminars venue, and cultural space in the western Indian state of Goa. It is located at Dona Paula, outside Panjim (Panjim).

topPlaces.name: Goa Velha
topPlaces.description: Goa Velha is a small town in Ilhas de Goa subdistrict, Goa state, India. It should not be confused with the World Heritage Site of the historical city of Old Goa (Portuguese: Velha Goa).

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Bambolim Beach?
faq.a: The best time to visit Bambolim Beach is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Bambolim Beach?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Goa International Airport, Dabolim (8 km) and the nearest railway station is Vasco da Gama (Goa) (7 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Bambolim Beach?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Bambolim Beach at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Bambolim Beach?
faq.a: Stays in Bambolim Beach start from ₹1,200 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Bambolim Beach?
faq.a: The top attractions are Grand Hyatt Goa, Siridao, Dr. Shyama Prasad Mukherjee Indoor Stadium, GMC Athletic Stadium, St. Cruz, Goa.
